# Sennen vs The Ordinary

Shoppers ask AI assistants questions like *"what's the best affordable skincare brand?"* — and today they're pointed to The Ordinary over Sennen. This page answers that head-on.

bridge: These fixes need to be applied to your store — and kept current as AI answers shift week to week. The AisleLens Shopify app does that automatically: it applies the approved changes, re-scans on a schedule, and tells you when your visibility (or a competitor's) moves.
